title: Review agriculture training options
summary: Prepare a review-only agriculture training next step for the user to inspect.
evidenceRequirement: Use a verified training source packet before any visible source-backed claim.
safeUseNotes: No enrollment, provider contact, message, payment, or backend action has been taken.
limitations: Review-only fixture. It does not register the user for training.

title: Review irrigation learning guidance
summary: Prepare a review-only irrigation learning next step with safe educational framing.
evidenceRequirement: Use a local or verified irrigation education source packet.
safeUseNotes: No equipment purchase, provider contact, or farm operation has been initiated.
limitations: Review-only fixture. It is educational and not site-specific engineering advice.

title: Review farm job pathway options
summary: Prepare a review-only workforce next step for farm job pathways.
evidenceRequirement: Use a verified workforce or training source packet before making opportunity claims.
safeUseNotes: No job application, employer contact, account change, or message has been submitted.
limitations: Review-only fixture. It does not apply for a job.

title: Review AgriTrade browse options
summary: Prepare a review-only marketplace browsing next step for AgriTrade.
evidenceRequirement: Use local marketplace module context only; no live buyer/seller claims.
safeUseNotes: No buy, sell, payment, message, order, shipping, or account action has been taken.
limitations: Review-only fixture. It does not create a listing or contact a buyer.

title: Review blocked call request
summary: Explain why call execution remains blocked and what approval gates would be required later.
evidenceRequirement: Resolved recipient, visible provider, explicit approval, and audit gate would be required in a future phase.
sourcePacketRequirement: Not source-backed guidance; this is a safety boundary note.
safeUseNotes: No call, message, provider handoff, or native bridge action has been started.
limitations: Review-only blocked-action fixture. It cannot call anyone.

title: Review blocked payment request
summary: Explain why payment execution remains blocked and what approval gates would be required later.
evidenceRequirement: Verified merchant, amount, consent, payment provider, audit, and compliance gate would be required in a future phase.
sourcePacketRequirement: Not source-backed guidance; this is a safety boundary note.
safeUseNotes: No payment, purchase, checkout, order, or account action has been started.
limitations: Review-only blocked-action fixture. It cannot process payments.
